kickoff_budget_note: Within the default AGENTS.md low-risk budget: 3 completed tasks, 1 reviewed lane-metadata file, no shared or integrator-locked edits, and required local gates rerun before handoff.
roadmap_items: Handoff packet scope accuracy: keep the reviewed commit description aligned with git history.
Lane metadata consistency: keep the reviewed packet and lane metadata focused on the single changed artifact.
scope_goal: Tighten the handoff packet so it matches commit `9df92deaec56128ba78436687873e835a67c08dc` exactly.
